channel.title: Patch Management on simeononsecurity
channel.description: Recent content in Patch Management on simeononsecurity

item.title: CompTIA CySA+ (CS0-003): Vulnerability Management and Scanning
item.category: "CompTIA CySA+ Course" , "Vulnerability Management" , "Vulnerability Scanning" , "Risk Prioritization" , "Web Application Security" , "CVSS" , "Cybersecurity Analyst" , "Patch Management" , "Security Operations" , "Cybersecurity"
item.description: Master vulnerability management for the CompTIA CySA+ CS0-003 exam. Learn scanning, CVSS and CVE, prioritization, web application vulnerabilities, software composition analysis, and secure baselines.

item.title: CompTIA SecOT+ (SOT-001): OT Security Operations
item.category: "CompTIA SecOT+ Course" , "OT Security Operations" , "Asset Inventory" , "SIEM" , "Vulnerability Management" , "Threat Hunting" , "Patch Management" , "Operational Technology" , "SOT-001" , "Cybersecurity"
item.description: Master OT security operations for the CompTIA SecOT+ SOT-001 exam. Learn asset inventory and discovery, data collection with SIEM and SOAR, baselining and threat hunting, vulnerability management, patching with compensating controls, and removable media security.

item.title: Patch Management Checklist: Enhancing Security and Stability
item.category: "Patch Management" , "Security Strategies" , "IT Management" , "Software Updates" , "System Maintenance" , "Cybersecurity Best Practices" , "Vulnerability Management" , "Compliance" , "Automation" , "Network Security"
item.description: Discover how to develop a robust patch management strategy, test and deploy security patches effectively, and automate patch management for improved system security and stability.

item.title: Mobile Device Security Checklist: Enhancing Protection and Privacy for Your Devices
item.category: "Mobile Device Security" , "Protection" , "Privacy" , "Checklist" , "Device Encryption" , "App Permissions" , "Mobile Device Management" , "Secure Access" , "Network Security" , "Patch Management"
item.description: Discover essential measures to enhance the security of your mobile devices with this comprehensive checklist, including device encryption, app permission management, and secure network access.
